core_customizations.name: Business Partner Credit & Caution blocking in Shipment Posting
core_customizations.description: Adds validation during goods shipment completion that checks the business partner's credit blocking (customer_blocking, vendor_blocking) and goods blocking (so_goods_blocking, po_goods_blocking) flags. Also validates uniqueness of the Navision external reference (bpartner_extref) across shipment lines, preventing completion when more than one external BP reference is present.
core_customizations.justification: Business partner credit hold enforcement on document completion is a generic ERP requirement. The blocking logic belongs in core M_INOUT_POST and would benefit any Etendo installation that needs financial risk controls at the logistics level. The Navision-specific external reference check should be moved to the Navision integration module.
api_changes_applicable: PostgreSQL PL/pgSQL function compatible across 24.1→25.4

core_customizations.name: AD XML sourcedata version gap artifacts
core_customizations.description: Large diff in AD_COLUMN.xml, AD_FIELD.xml, AD_TAB.xml, OBUISEL_SELECTOR_FIELD.xml, AD_MESSAGE.xml, AD_TEXTINTERFACES.xml — predominantly line removals (~97% of the diff). These represent Application Dictionary entries that were added between Etendo 24.1.2 (client version) and the 25.4.11 static baseline used for comparison. They are version gap artifacts, not client customizations.
core_customizations.justification: The diff is almost entirely comprised of removals: AD entries that exist in the 25.4.11 baseline but not in 24.1.2. These are features added by Etendo in versions 24.2–25.4. After upgrading the client to 25.4.x, this entire diff disappears automatically via update.database.

core_customizations.name: modules_core divergences (SecureWebServicesUtils, Action, StockReservationDataSource, PrintController, BaseProcessActionHandler, JavaScript files)
core_customizations.description: Seven files in modules_core (com.smf.securewebservices, com.smf.jobs, org.openbravo.client.application, org.openbravo.advpaymentmngt) and one core datasource class show diffs against the 25.4.11 baseline. Inspection reveals these are all version differences — the client runs older versions of these classes without modifications beyond what ships with Etendo 24.1.2. No ACICO-specific logic was found in any of these files.
core_customizations.justification: All module_core files examined contain standard Etendo 24.1.2 code with no client-specific modifications. The diff exists entirely because 25.4.x introduced significant refactoring in these classes (JasperReports upgrade, Jobs framework evolution, SecureWebServices JWT improvements). After upgrading to 25.4.x, these diffs vanish automatically.
api_changes_applicable: JasperReports 6.0 → 6.17 (PrintController.java)
Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x (Action.java uses MutableBoolean)
BaseProcessActionHandler refactoring in 25.x

core_customizations.name: Legacy HTML templates in ad_forms and ad_reports
core_customizations.description: UpdateReferenceData.html and other legacy HTML report templates in src/org/openbravo/erpCommon/ represent the pre-React classic UI rendering. These are servlet-based HTML forms generated server-side with XmlDocument.
core_customizations.justification: These are legacy HTML template files from the classic Compiere/Openbravo UI that are being replaced by the new React-based UI. They require no migration effort as functionality is already reimplemented natively in the new UI or will be via the Application Forms (AD_FORM) migration path.

core_customizations.name: Auto-generated formalChangesScript.xml
core_customizations.description: Auto-generated migration artifact produced by the DBSourceManager when running update.database. Contains recorded schema changes (ALTER TABLE, CREATE INDEX, etc.) for a specific migration path.
core_customizations.justification: Auto-generated by the platform, not a manual customization. This file is regenerated on every database update and should never be committed. It has no bearing on migration effort.

custom_modules.name: Navision ERP Integration
custom_modules.description: Bidirectional synchronization integration between Etendo and Microsoft Dynamics Navision. Sends products, product variants, process plans, sales orders, UoMs, business partners (with locations) and goods movements to Navision via SOAP web services. Imports stock levels, work efforts, goods shipments, and order recipes from Navision as background jobs. Includes field validation (email, Navision transaction range) and inventory blocking synchronization.
api_changes_applicable: Apache Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x: 24 files require package rename (StringUtils, MutableBoolean)
Gradle plugin 2.0+: build.gradle must be updated
Potential SOAP/JAX-WS library changes between 24.1 and 25.4
custom_modules.recommendation: This is a highly client-specific SOAP integration with a proprietary ERP. No standard Etendo replacement exists. For SaaS migration, the options are: (a) rewrite as an EtendoRX connector microservice, decoupling the logic from the Etendo core, or (b) evaluate if the client is migrating from Navision simultaneously. Regardless, this module requires dedicated project scoping with ACICO.
windows_unused: Enviar Pedidos de Venta a Navision
Enviar Plan de Producción a Navision
Enviar Unidades de Medida a Navisión
Enviar movimientos de almacén a Navision
Enviar Devolución de Venta a Navision

custom_modules.name: Navision Integration — Template Data
custom_modules.description: Initial configuration data for the Navision integration module (AD sequences, configuration values).

custom_modules.name: ACICO Manufacturing Extensions
custom_modules.description: Core manufacturing customizations for ACICO: work effort lifecycle management (open/close with consumption/production runs), quarantine order management with days tracking, minimum stock alerts with background recalculation, daily rotation calculations for perishable products, work requirement label printing, production run multi-validation and reactivation. Includes callouts for work effort movement date, work requirement process plan/product/quantity changes.
api_changes_applicable: Apache Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x: 1 file (StringUtils)
Manufacturing module API changes between 24.1 and 25.4
custom_modules.recommendation: Manufacturing customizations deeply tied to ACICO's production process (quarantine days, work effort lifecycle). Evaluate partial upstreaming of generic improvements (minimum stock alerts, daily rotation) to Etendo Manufacturing Extensions. ACICO-specific quarantine logic should remain as a separate module.
windows_unused: Minimum Stocks and Average Daily Rotation

custom_modules.name: ACICO Manufacturing Extensions — Spanish Translation
custom_modules.description: Spanish language translations for com.exos.acico AD entities.

custom_modules.name: ACICO Manufacturing Extensions — Template Data
custom_modules.description: Initial configuration and reference data for the ACICO manufacturing extensions.

custom_modules.name: ACICO Manufacturing Web Services
custom_modules.description: REST web services for manufacturing floor operations: pallet creation (CreatePallet, CreatePalletFromSSCC, CreatePalletLaMarga), SSCC (Serial Shipping Container Code) validation and matching, label PDF retrieval, work requirement product validation, work order completion validation. Designed to be consumed by mobile scanners or floor terminals on the production line.
api_changes_applicable: Secure web services JWT changes between 24.1 and 25.4
WebService interface compatibility
custom_modules.recommendation: These services tie to ACICO's specific pallet/SSCC workflow. Evaluate against EtendoRX mobile connector framework for SaaS. If ACICO continues using mobile terminals, rewrite as EtendoRX microservice endpoints.

custom_modules.name: ACICO Web Services — Spanish Translation
custom_modules.description: Spanish language translations for ACICO web services AD entities.

custom_modules.name: Broker/Commission Management
custom_modules.description: Commission and rappel management for commercial agents (brokers). Maintains a materialized view of broker-related data (RefreshMVData background job). Generates purchase credit notes and summary invoices from broker records. Supports rappel invoicing (CreateInvoiceRappel) and settlement of purchase invoices (SettlementPurchaseInvoices). Includes UI process buttons and filter expressions for default product selection.
api_changes_applicable: Apache Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x: 1 file
Apache POI 3.10 → 5.4: Excel report generation — CellType enum migration, CellStyle API changes
custom_modules.recommendation: Broker/commission management is a common requirement for distribution and manufacturing companies with external sales agents. Candidate to be promoted as an official Etendo marketplace module under the Sales Extensions bundle. Requires generalization (remove ACICO-specific hardcoded values), update of POI Excel code, and documentation.
windows_used: Informe de Rappels y Atípicos Resumido

custom_modules.name: Custom Costing Engine
custom_modules.description: Multi-method costing engine with 8 costing types: PurchaseCosting, InventoryCosting, ProductionCosting, MovementCosting, FinalCosting, LastDayCosting, OutAndStockFinalCosting, ReturnFromCustomerCosting, and CostVarianceCosting. Includes landed cost distribution by weight, background jobs for calculate/delete costing, and utility classes for inventory, movements, production, and transactions. Resolves costing for ACICO's complex manufacturing and multi-warehouse environment.
api_changes_applicable: Apache Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x: 13 files requiring migration
Etendo Costing Engine API changes between 24.1 and 25.4 (LandedCostDistributionAlgorithm interface)
custom_modules.recommendation: This is the most technically sophisticated custom module in the installation. The multi-method costing architecture is genuinely generalizable. Evaluate against Etendo's standard Average Cost and standard Landed Cost modules first. If gaps exist (LastDay costing, CostVariance), propose as an Advanced Costing Extensions bundle. The 13-file Commons Lang migration and costing API compatibility check are the main update tasks.

custom_modules.name: Business Partner Credit and Caution Management
custom_modules.description: Adds configurable credit blocking (customer_blocking, vendor_blocking) and goods blocking (so_goods_blocking, po_goods_blocking) fields to the Business Partner. These flags are checked during document completion (integrated with core M_INOUT_POST) to prevent completing transactions for financially blocked partners.
api_changes_applicable: Gradle plugin 2.0+: build.gradle update required
custom_modules.recommendation: This is a clean, focused module that fills a real gap in Etendo's credit management. Bundle candidate for Financial Extensions. The module is well-scoped and already integrated with core. Recommend upstreaming to Etendo Financial Extensions with minor generalization work.

custom_modules.name: ACICO Catch-All Customization Module
custom_modules.description: The largest module (144,602 LOC, 132 Java classes). Contains heterogeneous customizations across the entire ERP: (1) Accounting overrides — custom DocFINFinAccTransaction, DocFINPayment, DocMovement, DocDoubtfulDebt accounting handlers. (2) Document action handlers — CreateInvoiceCarrier, InvoiceFromShipmentActionHandler, InvoiceGeneratorFromGoodsShipment, CreateShipmentAction, ShipmentInvoice, ProcessAmortization. (3) Callouts — CheckDuplicatedEan, CompleteData (InOut), FillFieldsManager, FilterRateElectricityInvoice, InvoiceOperationDateCustom, ListPriceCalculation, SE_Invoice_BPartner (extends standard), SL_Invoice_Amt, SL_Internal_Consumption_Product. (4) Reports — Cashflow forecast, profit report, rotation report, Carta de Porte, loading sheet. (5) CreateFrom overrides — custom CreateFrom and ResetAccounting ad_actionButton. (6) Grid-level features — SRMOPickEditMovementLines, StockFormActionHandler. (7) Utilities — ChangeDatePromisedAndLoadingDate, ImportOrderFromMovement, ImportExcelColumnsConfiguration.
api_changes_applicable: Apache Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x: 61 files — largest single API migration task in the installation
Apache POI 3.10 → 5.4: Excel import/export functions require HSSF/XSSF API migration (CellType enum, CellStyle enum, Font.setBold)
Etendo DocXxx accounting handler API changes between 24.1 and 25.4
BaseProcessActionHandler evolution between 24.1 and 25.4
custom_modules.recommendation: This module is the critical blocker for migration. With 144K LOC and no coherent architectural boundary, it acts as a repository for every ACICO-specific tweak accumulated over years. The SaaS migration strategy MUST begin here: (1) decompose into functional sub-modules (accounting, invoicing, reporting), (2) evaluate each against standard Etendo and discard redundant code, (3) upstream generic improvements (the SE_BPartner callout extensions, the CreateFrom customizations), (4) shrink client-specific remainder. The Commons Lang migration alone affects 61 files and should be handled as a separate first step.
windows_unused: ACCM RFC/RTV HQL Pick / Edit Movement Lines
Observaciones de líneas de pedidos no servidas
Calcular Coste Lineas de Inventarios, Consumos y Movimientos
Motivos de Cambio de Fecha de Carga/Servicio

custom_modules.name: ACICO Customization — Template Data
custom_modules.description: Initial AD data for the ACICO customization module (document types, sequences, configuration).

custom_modules.name: Herakles WMS Integration
custom_modules.description: Integration with the Herakles warehouse management system. Creates delivery notes (albaranes) and files for Herakles from Etendo goods shipments and internal movements. Processes pallet lines and movement lines for WMS synchronization. Provides process buttons for creating and sending Herakles files, with test submission capability (SendTstOH).
api_changes_applicable: Apache Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x: 2 files
File I/O: uses NIO Paths/Files (compatible with Java 17)
custom_modules.recommendation: ACICO-specific integration with the Herakles WMS platform. No standard Etendo replacement. For SaaS, evaluate as an EtendoRX connector microservice. If ACICO maintains the Herakles WMS on-premise, this connector could be a standalone service calling both APIs.

custom_modules.name: Mass Invoice Email Distribution
custom_modules.description: Batch process to send invoice PDFs by email to customer contacts. Selects invoices to process, generates PDF via Jasper, and emails each to the corresponding business partner contact. Includes background job scheduling (SendInvoiceBackground) and per-invoice email logic with attachment handling.
api_changes_applicable: JasperReports 6.0 → 6.17: PDF generation API changes
Email infrastructure API compatibility
custom_modules.recommendation: Mass invoice emailing is a standard commercial need. Candidate for an Email Extensions or Document Distribution bundle. The JasperReports upgrade (6.0→6.17) is the main technical risk. Minor generalization work needed to remove ACICO-specific document type filters.

custom_modules.name: ACICO Blue UI Skin
custom_modules.description: Custom CSS/styling theme that applies a blue color scheme to the classic Etendo UI.
custom_modules.recommendation: Irrelevant for the new React UI which has its own theming system. Eliminate.

custom_modules.name: EDICOM EDI Integration
custom_modules.description: ACICO's EDI (Electronic Data Interchange) integration with the EDICOM platform. Supports bidirectional EDI flows: sends invoices, goods shipments, and internal movements to EDICOM; receives and processes purchase orders from EDICOM. Includes manual and automatic (background job) triggers, relation management between EDICOM documents and Etendo records, and custom file structure utilities for EDICOM's format requirements. Depends on com.smf.edicom (base EDICOM module).
api_changes_applicable: Apache Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x: 8 files
Depends on com.smf.edicom 2.3.5 (unmaintained) — must be resolved first
EDI file format compatibility with EDICOM platform version
custom_modules.recommendation: EDICOM is a B2B network integration platform used by large Spanish companies for fiscal EDI (facturas electrónicas, albaranes). This integration is both technically complex and legally critical. The dependency on unmaintained com.smf.edicom 2.3.5 is a HIGH risk that must be resolved before any other migration work. Options: (1) fork and maintain com.smf.edicom internally, (2) contact EDICOM for an official Etendo connector, (3) migrate to EtendoRX and rewrite as microservice.

custom_modules.name: SII (Tax Agency) Customization
custom_modules.description: Minor customizations for the Spanish Tax Agency SII (Suministro Inmediato de Información) reporting module. Adjusts or extends behavior of the standard SII module for ACICO's specific tax configuration.
api_changes_applicable: SII module API changes between 24.1 and 25.4
custom_modules.recommendation: Evaluate whether the SII customizations are still necessary with the latest Etendo SII module. If not needed, eliminate. If needed, upstream the fix to the standard SII module.

unmaintained_modules.name: EDICOM Base Module
unmaintained_modules.function: Base EDI communication module for the EDICOM platform (version 2.3.5). Provides the common infrastructure for EDI message exchange that com.smf.edicom.acico depends on.
api_changes_applicable: Apache Commons Lang 2.x → 3.x (likely used throughout)
No maintainer to apply API updates
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: CRITICAL dependency for com.smf.edicom.acico. Without resolving this module, the EDI integration cannot be updated. Fork the module, apply the Commons Lang and other API migrations, and take ownership of maintenance — or engage EDICOM directly for an official Etendo 25.x connector.

unmaintained_modules.name: Create Work Requirements from Work Efforts
unmaintained_modules.function: Provides functionality to generate Work Requirements directly from Work Efforts in the manufacturing module. Fills a gap in the standard Etendo manufacturing workflow.
api_changes_applicable: Manufacturing module API changes between 24.1 and 25.4
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Actively used in ACICO's manufacturing workflow. No standard replacement. Fork and maintain, or propose upstream to Etendo Manufacturing Extensions.

unmaintained_modules.name: Create WR from WE — Template Data
unmaintained_modules.function: Template data for com.smf.createwrfromwe.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows com.smf.createwrfromwe fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Shipment InOut Customization
unmaintained_modules.function: Customizes the Goods Shipment/Receipt document behavior. Likely adds fields or workflow changes to inbound/outbound shipment processing.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: No maintainer. Evaluate whether the shipment customization functionality has been superseded by Etendo Warehouse Extensions or Financial Extensions. If still needed, fork and maintain.

unmaintained_modules.name: Shipment InOut Customization — Template Data
unmaintained_modules.function: Template data for com.smf.customizationshipmentinout.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows com.smf.customizationshipmentinout fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Goods InOut Accounting Posting
unmaintained_modules.function: Custom accounting posting logic for goods receipts and shipments (M_InOut). Provides an alternative posting mechanism or additional posting behavior beyond the standard M_INOUT_POST function.
api_changes_applicable: Accounting engine API changes between 24.1 and 25.4
No maintainer (Precognis)
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Unknown author (Precognis), no maintainer. The functionality may overlap with the M_INOUT_POST customization in core. Audit whether this module is still active and what specific posting gap it fills before migrating.

unmaintained_modules.name: InOut Posting — Template Data
unmaintained_modules.function: Template data for com.precognis.inoutposting.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows com.precognis.inoutposting fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Advanced Traceability
unmaintained_modules.function: Extended lot/serial number traceability for products in the manufacturing and warehouse modules. Provides traceability chains beyond the standard Etendo traceability.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Evaluate whether the standard Etendo Warehouse Extensions includes the required traceability functionality. If yes, migrate configuration and eliminate this module.

unmaintained_modules.name: Advanced Traceability — Template Data
unmaintained_modules.function: Template data for com.etendoerp.traceability.advanced.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows com.etendoerp.traceability.advanced fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Warehouse Management Application (WMA)
unmaintained_modules.function: Mobile/terminal application interface for warehouse management operations (receiving, putaway, picking, shipping). Provides the Etendo WMA that runs on handheld scanners.
unmaintained_modules.official_replacement_name: Etendo Mobile (modern WMS application for scanners)
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Likely superseded by Etendo's modern mobile WMS. Verify with Etendo whether Etendo Mobile provides equivalent functionality for ACICO's scanner operations. Migration effort = configuration of the new mobile app, not code migration.

unmaintained_modules.name: Warehouse Management Web Services (WMAWS)
unmaintained_modules.function: REST/SOAP web services layer for the Warehouse Management Application. Exposes warehouse operations (receive, pick, pack, ship) as web service endpoints for the scanner terminals.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Paired with com.etendoerp.warehousemanagementapplication. Superseded by EtendoRX mobile backend services. Evaluate simultaneously with the WMA application.

unmaintained_modules.name: SMF Warehouse Management Web Services
unmaintained_modules.function: Alternative/extended WMS web services from SMF. May provide additional endpoints beyond the Etendo standard WMAWS.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Evaluate if functionality overlaps with com.etendoerp.warehousemanagementws replacement. Coordinate with EtendoRX migration.

unmaintained_modules.name: Electronic Invoice Spain — Translations
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for the Openbravo e-invoice module (Factura Electrónica). Legal fiscal compliance module for Spain.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Fiscal compliance module. Verify that Etendo's current Spain localization package includes Factura Electrónica B2B/B2G (FACeB2B/Verifactu) support, as requirements have changed significantly since 2022.

unmaintained_modules.name: Spain Localization (Openbravo 3.30)
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish fiscal localization package from Openbravo 3.30 era. Includes chart of accounts, tax rates, payment methods, and Spanish-specific AR/AP configurations.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Significantly outdated. The current Etendo Spain localization package supersedes this. Migration effort = verifying CoA compatibility and re-mapping any custom tax configurations.

unmaintained_modules.name: Invoice Cloning
unmaintained_modules.function: Provides functionality to clone (copy) invoice documents, creating a new invoice with the same lines and header data as the source.
unmaintained_modules.official_replacement_name: Etendo Copy Record (core toolbar button, available in all Transaction windows)
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Standard Etendo Copy Record (Clone) toolbar button should provide equivalent functionality. Test and verify, then eliminate this module.

unmaintained_modules.name: Invoice Cloning — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for com.openbravo.gps.clone.invoices.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Eliminate with main module.

unmaintained_modules.name: Finance Balance Excel Export Report
unmaintained_modules.function: Generates a financial balance sheet / trial balance report as an Excel file. Used for accounting review and external reporting.
api_changes_applicable: Apache POI 3.10 → 5.4 if the Excel generation uses HSSF API
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: No maintained replacement in current Etendo catalog. Evaluate the Etendo Financial Reports module for equivalent functionality. If not covered, fork and update the POI Excel API.

unmaintained_modules.name: Expense Approval Workflow
unmaintained_modules.function: Workflow module for expense approval management (aprobación de gastos). Likely provides a multi-level approval process for expense reports or purchase requisitions.
unmaintained_modules.official_replacement_name: Etendo Advanced Purchase Approval (if available in current catalog)
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Evaluate against Etendo's current purchase approval modules. If a maintained alternative exists, migrate configuration. Otherwise, fork and maintain.

unmaintained_modules.name: Budget Creation from Excel
unmaintained_modules.function: Import and processing functionality for budget creation from Excel files.
api_changes_applicable: Apache POI 3.10 → 5.4 if uses Excel generation
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Low risk. Evaluate against Etendo's standard budget module Excel import. If not covered, the update is straightforward.

unmaintained_modules.name: Incidents Management Window
unmaintained_modules.function: Provides a simple incidents/issues tracking window for recording operational incidents.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Simple window definition. Low risk. Evaluate if ACICO still actively uses this or if it can be eliminated.

unmaintained_modules.name: Reactive Goods — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for a reactive goods module. Parent module may be a Gradle Source dependency.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows the parent reactive goods module fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Read Utility
unmaintained_modules.function: Internal utility module providing read helper functionality used by other SMF modules.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Utility dependency. Evaluate if any retained modules depend on it. If not, eliminate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Production Cost Module
unmaintained_modules.function: Production costing module providing cost calculation for manufacturing transactions. May overlap with com.smf.acico.costing.
api_changes_applicable: Costing engine API changes between 24.1 and 25.4
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Evaluate dependency relationship with com.smf.acico.costing. If one supersedes the other, eliminate the redundant one.

unmaintained_modules.name: Production Cost Module — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for com.etendoerp.productioncost.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows com.etendoerp.productioncost fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: SQL Print Utility
unmaintained_modules.function: Developer/admin utility for executing and printing SQL queries directly from the Etendo UI.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Admin tool. Can be replaced by org.openbravo.utility.hqlquerytool or eliminated in production.

unmaintained_modules.name: IVA Navarra Multidimensional Tax Report
unmaintained_modules.function: Specialized tax report for IVA (VAT) under the Navarra foral regime (a special tax jurisdiction in Spain with separate VAT rules). Generates multidimensional tax summaries for Navarra tax declarations.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Fiscally specific to Navarra regime. Evaluate whether ACICO still has Navarra fiscal obligations. If yes, this must be maintained or an official Navarra localization module acquired.

unmaintained_modules.name: Bank Statement CSV Importer
unmaintained_modules.function: Imports bank statements from generic CSV files into Etendo's bank reconciliation module.
unmaintained_modules.official_replacement_name: Etendo Advanced Payment Management bank import (if CSV format supported)
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Evaluate whether the current Etendo APRM (Advanced Payment Management) includes CSV bank import. If yes, configure and eliminate this module.

unmaintained_modules.name: Bank Statement CSV Importer — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for org.openbravo.bankstatement.importer.generic.csv.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows main module fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: File BLOB Storage
unmaintained_modules.function: Provides file storage as database BLOBs for the Etendo attachment system. May be a dependency for modules that store files (receipts, scanned documents).
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Evaluate if any currently-used module depends on this. The core Etendo attachment framework may have superseded this. In SaaS, file storage should use cloud-native object storage, not DB BLOBs.

unmaintained_modules.name: AEAT Modelo 340 Tax Report
unmaintained_modules.function: Generates the Spanish AEAT Modelo 340 tax declaration (declaración informativa de operaciones incluidas en los libros registro del IVA). Note: Modelo 340 was superseded by SII in 2017 for large taxpayers.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Modelo 340 was replaced by SII for large companies in 2017. If ACICO is a large taxpayer, this module is obsolete. Verify fiscal obligation before any migration work.

unmaintained_modules.name: IDL Java Integration
unmaintained_modules.function: Java implementation of the Openbravo IDL (Interface Definition Language) for external system integration.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Legacy Openbravo integration framework. Superseded by EtendoRX microservices architecture.

unmaintained_modules.name: IDL — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for org.openbravo.module.idljava.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows org.openbravo.module.idljava fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Invoice Matching Algorithm
unmaintained_modules.function: Provides algorithms for automatically matching purchase invoices against goods receipts (3-way matching). Automates the reconciliation between PO, receipt, and invoice.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Evaluate whether Etendo Financial Extensions covers 3-way matching. If yes, migrate configuration and eliminate.

unmaintained_modules.name: HQL Query Tool
unmaintained_modules.function: Admin utility for executing HQL (Hibernate Query Language) queries directly from the Etendo interface. Used for data analysis and debugging.
unmaintained_modules.official_replacement_name: Etendo Admin Query Tool (if available) or equivalent
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Admin-only tool. Evaluate if needed in production SaaS environment. Consider eliminating and using database direct access for admin queries.

unmaintained_modules.name: OpenCSV Library
unmaintained_modules.function: OpenCSV library wrapper for CSV parsing operations.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Library wrapper. Likely superseded by standard CSV libraries in Etendo 25.x. Verify no modules explicitly depend on this wrapper.

unmaintained_modules.name: Freight Management
unmaintained_modules.function: Freight cost management and calculation for logistics operations. Adds freight-related fields and calculations to sales orders and shipments.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Relevant for ACICO's distribution operations. No clear maintained replacement. Evaluate against Etendo Logistics Extensions. Fork and maintain if still needed.

unmaintained_modules.name: Freight Management — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for org.openbravo.materialmgmt.freightmgmt.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows freight management fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: EXOS System Logging
unmaintained_modules.function: Custom logging infrastructure module from EXOS that provides structured operational logging. Used by other EXOS modules (com.exos.acico.webservices imports Log and EXOSLogStatus classes).
api_changes_applicable: Log4j/SLF4J API compatibility
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Used by com.exos.acico.webservices. If that module is retained, this must be maintained. If webservices are rewritten as EtendoRX services, this becomes unnecessary.

unmaintained_modules.name: EXOS Logging — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for com.exos.erp.system.logging.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows com.exos.erp.system.logging fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Manufacturing MPS — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for the com.exos.erp.manufacturing.mps module (Master Production Scheduling). The main module is a Gradle Source dependency.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows com.exos.erp.manufacturing.mps fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Manufacturing Status — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for com.exos.erp.manufacturing.status.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows manufacturing status module fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Sales Forecast — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for com.exos.erp.sales.forecast.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows sales forecast module fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: IBON — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for com.exos.erp.ibon (IBON integration module).
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Follows com.exos.erp.ibon fate.

unmaintained_modules.name: Asset Amortization Report — Spanish Translation
unmaintained_modules.function: Spanish translations for an asset amortization report module.
unmaintained_modules.recommendation: Evaluate if the parent module has a maintained replacement in Etendo Financial Extensions.

ui_readiness.note: Completitud global del nuevo UI Etendo React según all-features-analysis.md (2026-03-31). Prioridades calculadas por volume de uso en la AD de ACICO.

top_blockers: Section 4 — Display Logic @field_name@ bug (2.753 campos afectados)
Section 3.A.2c — 245 procesos Manual Action con dependencia OB.* namespace
Section 2.B.2 — Posted button PARCIAL 30% (309 columnas contables)
Section 26 — 56 tabs con filtros por defecto NOT DONE

features.title: Ventanas tipo Maintain (M)
features.ad_detail: 361 ventanas de tipo M (mantenimiento de maestros)
features.reason: El tipo de ventana más usado en ACICO. La implementación base existe pero tiene gaps conocidos: multi-record delete, Copy Record en tabs hijo (enablecopyfull/enablecopyrelationships), propagación del flag Active. Con 361 ventanas, cualquier gap sistémico impacta amplísimamente.

features.title: Ventanas tipo Transaction (T)
features.ad_detail: 48 ventanas de tipo Transaction (documentos con ciclo de vida)
features.reason: Las ventanas transaccionales de ACICO (órdenes, facturas, albaranes, producción) dependen de DocAction, Posted y estado de documento. El botón Posted tiene PARCIAL 30% (309 columnas afectadas) y la lógica de readonly post-completado no está validada. Bloqueo funcional real para operaciones core de manufactura y finanzas.

features.title: Ventanas tipo Query/Info (Q)
features.reason: Bajo volumen. El modo read-only básico está implementado. La lista exacta de botones ocultos en modo Q y el comportamiento al abrirse como selector popup necesitan validación pero no bloquean operaciones críticas.

features.title: Ventanas Pick and Execute (OBUIAPP_PickAndExecute)
features.reason: 63 ventanas P&E con estado PARCIAL: faltan validaciones de campos inline obligatorios antes de Execute, modo single-select, propagación de contexto del padre, y manejo de openDirectTab en la respuesta. Muchos procesos de manufactura (listas de picking, confirmación de producción) usan este patrón.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — Multi-Selector
features.reason: 63 campos de selección múltiple (tipo chip/tag) no tienen implementación en el nuevo UI. Los campos que usan este tipo en ventanas de producción, clasificaciones y configuración no renderizarán. Impacto directo en formularios activos del cliente.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — PAttribute (Atributos de Producto)
features.reason: ACICO gestiona lotes, series y atributos de producto extensamente (manufactura). El selector AttributeSetInstance existe pero hay gaps: dependencia del campo Producto para determinar el AttributeSet, validación de atributos obligatorios en el popup, y diferencia entre atributos de instancia vs no-instancia.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — Image BLOB
features.reason: 20 campos de imagen binaria (preview inline, upload, clear) sin implementar. No bloquea operaciones core pero sí campos de producto, documentos adjuntos y configuración visual que ACICO usa.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — General Quantity
features.reason: Cubierto parcialmente por NumericSelector pero sin precisión específica de unidades de medida. En manufactura, las cantidades con UOM específicas deben mostrar la precisión decimal correcta.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — Rich Text
features.reason: 8 campos WYSIWYG sin implementar. Requiere decisión de librería (TinyMCE u otro) compatible con el HTML generado por el classic UI. Impacto bajo en volumen pero visible en ventanas de descripción/notas enriquecidas.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — Binary
features.reason: 8 campos de BLOB binario sin implementar. Generalmente documentos o archivos adjuntos almacenados en base de datos. Bajo impacto en uso diario de ACICO.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — Link (URL)
features.reason: 6 campos de URL sin implementar como link clicable. Impacto menor pero visible cuando los usuarios quieren navegar a URLs desde registros.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — Assignment (Asignación de Recursos)
features.reason: 5 campos de asignación de recursos (Sales Order Lines, Purchase Order Lines). Requiere popup específico de selección de franjas horarias. Impacto moderado si ACICO usa planificación de recursos.

features.title: Tipos de referencia de campo — Color
features.reason: 2 campos de selector de color sin implementar. Impacto bajo en ACICO.

features.title: Botón DocAction (Acción de Documento)
features.ad_detail: 6 columnas DocAction en tablas de documento
features.reason: La funcionalidad core de DocAction está implementada y los filtros de estado funcionan. El único issue conocido es que los labels/nombres de las opciones del dropdown no se muestran correctamente. Crítico para el ciclo de vida de órdenes, facturas y albaranes de ACICO.

features.title: Botón Posted (Contabilizado)
features.reason: 309 columnas Posted con implementación solo del 30%: falta la representación visual de los 3 estados (N/Y/E), el contador de asientos contables, el link al visor de Accounting Transaction Details, y el manejo de período cerrado. ACICO tiene contabilidad activa y múltiples documentos contabilizables. Sin este botón los contables no pueden verificar el estado contable de los documentos.

features.title: Botón CreateFrom (Crear Desde Documento)
features.ad_detail: 8 columnas CreateFrom en tablas de documento
features.reason: Implementado como Process Definition (separado correctamente de Copy Record). Pendiente validar: grid con checkboxes en el modal, cálculo de cantidad restante (entrega parcial), y cobertura de los 6 tipos de documento. Uso frecuente en generación de facturas desde órdenes.

features.title: Botón ChangeProjectStatus
features.ad_detail: No detectado en la AD de ACICO
features.reason: Sin instancias en esta instalación. No aplica a ACICO.

features.title: Procesos estándar R&P (UIPattern=S)
features.reason: 166 procesos estándar que dependen de ProcessDefinitionModal con parámetros AD. Gaps: mapping de tipos de referencia en parámetros, default values con expresiones (@#Date@, @AD_ORG_ID@, SQL), y secuencia de parámetros por seqno. Muy usado en reportes y procesos batch de ACICO.

features.title: Reports legacy HTML (ISREPORT=Y)
features.reason: 119 reportes legacy que dependen del classic UI vía iframe. Si el classic UI no corre simultáneamente, estos reportes no funcionan. ACICO tiene reportes operativos críticos (producción, stock, ventas) implementados como HTML templates legacy. Requiere decisión: iframe o reimplementación React.

features.title: Procesos en background (ISBACKGROUND=Y)
features.reason: 55 procesos de background (rotación mínima, alertas de stock, cálculos nocturnos) sin Process Monitor integration en el nuevo UI. ACICO tiene procesos nocturnos de manufactura y alertas de stock mínimo que son críticos para la operación. Sin monitoreo en tiempo real, los operadores no saben si los procesos fallaron.

features.title: Procesos Manual Action (UIPattern=M, AD_PROCESS)
features.reason: 245 procesos Manual Action dependen de namespaces OB.* (OB.CurrentView, OB.MainView, OB.Utilities, etc.) que no existen en React. Bloqueador arquitectónico: decisión pendiente entre iframe (requiere classic UI simultáneo), shim de OB.*, o reimplementación caso a caso. Impacta procesos core de ACICO: Open/Close Períodos, generación de facturas masiva, procesos de picking.

features.title: Process Definition Action (UIPattern=A)
features.reason: 76 PD Actions que invocan ActionHandlers. La implementación base existe pero hay gaps en el payload JSON exacto, diferencia entre showMsgInProcessView vs showMsgInView, y verificación de AD_Process_Access client-side. Muy usado en procesos transaccionales de ACICO.

features.title: Process Definition Manual JS (UIPattern=M)
features.ad_detail: 20 Process Definitions con UIPattern=M (Manual JS, OB.* namespaces)
features.reason: Bloqueador arquitectónico: 20 PD manuales usan OB.OpenClose.*, OB.RoleInheritance.*, OB.ETAPI.*, OB.OBWPL.*, etc. Estos namespaces no existen en React. Incluye procesos críticos: Open Close Periods, Recalculate Role Permissions, Asignar/Cancelar/Cerrar Picking Lists. Requiere decisión arquitectónica antes de implementar.

features.title: Process Definition Standard (OBUIAPP_PickAndExecute)
features.reason: 153 PD Standard con popup de parámetros AD. Gaps: default values con referencias a campos del formulario padre (@C_BPartner_ID@), parameter grouping, display logic en parámetros, e IDs de filas cuando se invoca desde P&E window. El tipo de PD más frecuente en ACICO.

features.title: Process Definition Report (OBUIAPP_Report / Jasper)
features.reason: Bajo volumen de Jasper en ACICO. Los OBUIAPP_Report están mejor implementados que los legacy HTML. Pendiente: selector de formato PDF/Excel en popup y timeout handling para reportes grandes.

features.title: Display Logic (visibilidad dinámica de campos)
features.reason: Bug activo documentado: la sintaxis @field_name@ en expresiones de display logic causa errores JavaScript en React. ACICO tiene 2.753 campos con display logic — prácticamente todas las ventanas con formularios dinámicos están afectadas. Es el bloqueador funcional más impactante del nuevo UI para este cliente. Hasta que se corrija, múltiples ventanas crashean al cargar.

features.title: Comportamientos de Tab (SR, RO, ED, display logic)
features.ad_detail: 67 tabs SR (Single Record) + 225 tabs RO (Read-Only) + 15 tabs ED (Editable Grid) + 53 tabs con display logic + 56 con HQLFILTERCLAUSE (ver sección 26)
features.reason: ACICO tiene 67 tabs Single Record (formulario sin grid, un solo registro) y 225 tabs RO que deben mostrar datos sin edición. Gaps: tabs SR sin validar (no grid, sin botón New/Delete), lazy loading de datos de tab, y tab count badge refresh post-proceso. El tab display logic (53 tabs) incluye tabs que cambian visibilidad según el registro padre.

features.title: Callouts (lógica de negocio en cambio de campo)
features.reason: ACICO tiene 95 callouts que ejecutan lógica de negocio al cambiar campos (recálculo de totales, validaciones cruzadas, actualización de combos). La implementación está avanzada (GlobalCalloutManager, ON_BLUR/ON_CHANGE). Gaps restantes: callout chaining prevention, respuestas WARNING/ERROR en message bar, y re-filtering de selectores por callout.

features.title: Máquina de estados de documento
features.ad_detail: 48 ventanas Transaction con ciclo de vida de documento
features.reason: Los 10 estados de documento (DR, CO, CL, VO, RE, IP, etc.) deben tener colores/iconos específicos y el DocAction dropdown solo debe mostrar transiciones válidas. Íntimamente ligado a la brecha de DocAction labels (2.B.1). Status IP (Under Way) debe deshabilitar todas las acciones mientras el proceso ejecuta.

features.title: Selectores y campos FK (OBUISEL_Selector)
features.reason: 703 selectores con typeahead que poblan campos FK. Brecha crítica: Selector Out Parameters (ISOUTPARAMETER=Y) — al seleccionar una fila el selector puede poblar múltiples campos simultáneamente. Si no está implementado, los formularios que dependen de este comportamiento (p.ej. seleccionar producto y que se rellenen precio, descripción, UOM automáticamente) quedan rotos. También faltan: popup con columnas extra, reglas de validación (ad_val_rule) y SelectorAsLink en grid.

features.title: Comportamientos del grid/lista
features.reason: El grid está implementado con sorting, filtering y paginación. Gaps que afectan a ACICO: columnas de filtro rápido (isselectioncolumn=Y), operadores de filtro (contains/starts with/equals), row styling para registros anulados (strikethrough) e inactivos (grayed). ACICO tiene muchos documentos anulados que deben visibilizarse diferenciados.

features.title: Autenticación y Sesión (JWT)
features.ad_detail: Infraestructura base — no medida en AD
features.reason: JWT en progreso. Gaps significativos: multi-tab logout synchronization (logout en una pestaña debe propagar a todas), token renewal, role switching completo (reset de sesión + menú + preferencias), y org switch con actualización de warehouse. Estos gaps afectan la experiencia de usuarios que trabajan con múltiples roles u organizaciones (ACICO tiene multi-org).

features.title: Formularios de Aplicación (AD_FORM)
features.reason: Bloqueador arquitectónico: 31 formularios custom (Initial Client Setup, Enterprise Module Mgmt, Create Invoices from Orders, Create Shipments from Orders, GL Posting, Alert Management, etc.) sin implementación React. Decisión pendiente: iframe (requiere classic UI simultáneo) vs reimplementación caso a caso. Varios son críticos para la operación de ACICO (generación masiva de facturas/albaranes, contabilización masiva).

features.title: Workspace / Dashboard (My Etendo)
features.ad_detail: Pantalla de inicio del sistema — sin instancias AD específicas
features.reason: Bloqueador arquitectónico: el API contract para widgets custom en React no está definido. Los widgets SmartClient del classic UI (URL Widget, Query Widget, Reference Widget, Custom JS Widget) son incompatibles. ACICO usa el workspace como pantalla de inicio con KPIs de manufactura y alertas de stock. Sin definición de este contrato, los módulos de terceros y las customizaciones de ACICO no pueden proveer widgets.

features.title: Valores por Defecto de Columnas
features.reason: Los defaults funcionan en server round-trip (FormInitializationComponent NEW mode) pero el UI nunca lee ni aplica defaults client-side. El gap principal: @ColumnName@ defaults no son reactivos — si el usuario cambia el campo fuente, el campo destino no se actualiza sin callout. Con 6.325 columnas con default, cualquier formulario nuevo en ACICO puede verse afectado por esta brecha de UX.

features.title: Filtros por Defecto de Tab (HQLFILTERCLAUSE)
features.reason: NOT DONE verificado: TabBuilder.java no envía hqlFilterClause al UI, y el UI no lo consume. Con 56 tabs con filtros por defecto, los usuarios verán datos que deberían estar ocultos (ej: una tab de 'Líneas de Pedido Activas' mostraría también las canceladas). Esto puede causar confusión operativa grave. Requiere verificar si el endpoint REST aplica los filtros server-side automáticamente.

features.title: Personalización de Vistas (Saved Views)
features.reason: Bloqueador arquitectónico: los botones de toolbar 'personalization' y 'manageviews' están ausentes del codebase. OBUIAPP_UIPersonalization no implementado. Si los usuarios del classic UI tenían vistas personalizadas guardadas (columnas visibles, layouts de formulario, filtros guardados), estas no estarán disponibles en el nuevo UI. Afecta a todos los usuarios que hayan personalizado su entorno en ACICO.

features.title: Vistas de Calendario
features.ad_detail: Sin ventanas con OBCalendar/OBMultiCalendar identificadas en ACICO
features.reason: No se detectaron ventanas con calendario en la AD de ACICO. No aplica a este cliente.

features.title: Botones hardcoded (DocAction + Posted + CreateFrom) — agregado para scoring
features.ad_detail: 309 Posted + 6 DocAction + 8 CreateFrom = 323 columnas de botón hardcoded
features.reason: Valor agregado para el motor de scoring. Ver secciones 2.B.1, 2.B.2, 2.B.3 para detalle. Ponderado por volumen: Posted (309 cols, 30%) domina este score.

features.title: Procesos (todos los tipos) — agregado para scoring
features.ad_detail: 166 S + 245 M-AD + 20 M-PD + 119 ISREPORT + 55 ISBACKGROUND + 76 A + 153 P&E + 11 Report + 3 Jasper + ...otros = ~865 procesos
features.reason: Valor agregado. Ver secciones 3.A.x y 3.B.x para detalle por tipo.

features.title: ReadOnly Logic (lógica de solo lectura por campo)
features.reason: 1.260 campos con expresiones de readonly dinámico. La implementación base existe en el nuevo UI pero la paridad exacta con el classic UI no está validada. El ReadOnly Logic controla qué campos son editables según el estado del documento — crítico para la integridad de datos en ACICO.

features.title: Display Logic en Tabs (visibilidad de pestañas)
features.ad_detail: 53 tabs con DISPLAYLOGIC que controla su visibilidad
features.reason: 53 tabs que se muestran u ocultan según el valor del registro padre. Si el display logic de tab no re-evalúa al cambiar el registro padre, los usuarios verán tabs que deberían estar ocultos o viceversa.

features.title: Tabs de solo lectura (UIPATTERN=RO)
features.reason: 225 tabs que deben mostrar datos sin permitir edición. El modo RO base está implementado pero la lista de botones ocultos (New, Save, Delete, Undo) no está completamente validada.
